//comment_secrets: PATs are read from environment variables DECONZ_DATA_PAT and DECONZ_SITE_PAT. Usernames/PATs can also be overridden here or in appsettings.local.json (gitignored). Never commit a PAT.
//comment_datasubdir: Subfolder inside the data repo that holds the day CSVs. Set to empty to read from the repo root.
//comment_offline: Set UseLocalDataDir to a path to skip cloning the data repo and read CSVs directly (e.g. examples_data). Leave empty for normal git mode.
//comment_push: Set PushChanges to false to generate the site locally without pushing to the target repo.
//comment_stale: Drop readings whose LastUpdated lags the snapshot time by more than this many hours (e.g. a sensor with a dead battery reporting a frozen value). Set to 0 to keep all readings.
